untranslatable_reason: Head-and-Shoulders Bottom (Inner/Complex variety) pattern requires identification of multiple shoulder pairs and neckline geometry. This requires multi-bar pattern recognition and structural analysis beyond single-bar indicator conditions. The 'formation of multiple shoulder pairs' and 'neckline connecting rises' cannot be reliably expressed with available point-in-time indicators. Converted entry uses proxy conditions (breakout above Donchian high near price range top with volume confirmation and RSI not overbought) as approximation of pattern completion, but true pattern structure validation is untranslatable.
